# Hi-Tech Printers

## About

Hi-Tech Printers is a professional offset printing press located in S.I.T.E Industrial Area, Karachi, Pakistan. We have been providing high-quality printing services for over 20 years.

## Location

- Address: D-123/A, S.I.T.E Industrial Area, Near Bawani Chali, Karachi, Pakistan
- Area served: All of Karachi — including S.I.T.E, Nazimabad, Korangi, DHA, Clifton, and surrounding areas

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +92 334 321 9844
- Email: info@hitechprinters.pk
- Website: https://hitechprinters.com.pk
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM

## What We Do

We are a commercial offset printing press specialising in:

**Corporate Stationery**
- Business cards (single and double-sided, 300–400 GSM, lamination, spot UV)
- Letterheads (A4 and custom, 90–120 GSM bond paper)
- Envelopes (C4, C5, DL sizes — window and non-window)
- Presentation folders (A4, gloss/matte laminate, business card slot)
- Notepads (glue-bound and wire-O, 25–100 sheets)
- Compliment slips (1/3 A4 branded slips)
- Certificates (A4 and A3 landscape, foil borders, serial numbering)
- Bill books and receipt pads (carbonless NCR, 2-part and 3-part sets)

**Marketing and Promotional Materials**
- Flyers (A4, A5, A6 — single and double-sided, full-colour CMYK)
- Brochures (bi-fold, tri-fold, Z-fold — A4 and A3)
- Posters (A2, A1, A0 — indoor and outdoor)
- Banners (custom widths — roll-up and flat)
- Catalogues (saddle-stitched and perfect bound — pharma and textile specialists)
- Booklets (8–64 pages, saddle-stitch binding)

**Packaging and Labels**
- Product labels (pharma-grade, barcode and QR, waterproof options, die-cut)
- Sticker sheets (matte and glossy vinyl, kiss-cut and die-cut)
- Boxes and cartons (custom structural design, E-flute and solid board, spot UV)
- Hang tags (300–450 GSM, custom shapes, foiling)
- Wrappers (BOPP and coated paper, food-safe inks)
- Taffeta and fabric labels (for garments and retail — full-colour offset print)

**School and Institutional**
- Diaries (A5 and A4, wire-O and case binding, bulk institutional pricing)
- Exercise books (100–200 pages, branded cover, saddle-stitch)
- Result cards and admission forms (carbonless NCR, serial numbering)
- Calendars (wall and desk, wire-O binding)
- Notebooks (40–80 pages, A5 and A4)
- Admissions prospectuses (24–80 pages, saddle-stitch or perfect bound)
- Bound books and publications (hard cover and perfect bound, academic and religious titles)

**Event and Occasion**
- Wedding cards (pearl and textured paper, gold and silver foiling, envelope)
- Invitation cards (single and folded, multiple paper stocks, spot UV)
- Event programmes (A5 booklet or folded, same-day rush)
- Menus (A4 and A5, laminated, wipe-clean coating)
- Numbered tickets (sequential numbering, perforated stubs, barcode and QR)

**Bulk and Custom**
- Custom sizes (any dimension on request, die-cutting and score/fold)
- Specialty finishes (spot UV, foil stamping, embossing, soft-touch laminate)
- High-volume orders (1,000 to 100,000+ units, volume-tiered pricing)
- Branded packaging (box, bag and wrap combos, consistent multi-SKU batches)

## Why Choose Hi-Tech Printers

- 20+ years of experience in offset printing in Karachi
- Precision offset press capable of tight registration and rich colour
- Serving corporate clients, schools, hospitals, retail brands, and Instagram sellers
- Real clients include: ICMA Pakistan, Port & Protocol, First Paramount Modarba, Dar e Arqam Schools, Cadet Colleges, Riphah College, Iqra Teachers Training, and many retail and eCommerce brands
- Price calculator available on website for instant estimates
- WhatsApp-first quoting — fast turnaround on custom requirements

## Keywords
